chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr.Bail.Appl.No.S- 441 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.07.2014. Mr. Altaf Hussain Chandio, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shahid Shaikh, A.P.G. for the State. = After arguing the matter at some length and referring to the bail order 13.11.2013 whereby co-accused Haji Khadim Hussain has been granted bail by this Court, the learned counsel when confronted with the fact that the allegation against co-accused who has been granted bail by this Court is quite different as recovery of alleged K.K. is shown to have been affected from the present applicant / accused, he stated that he would be satisfied and would not be pressing this bail application in case direction to the trial Court to examine the material witnesses within a span of 02 months are issued. Learned A.P.G. appearing on behalf of the State has raised no objection to the above proposition forwarded by learned defence counsel. In view of such position, the bail application is dismissed, however the learned trial Court is directed to examine the material witnesses within a span of 02 months, whereafter, the applicant would be at liberty to move a fresh bail application, if so advised. JUDGE Tufail
